response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates extensive experience as a Senior Full Stack Engineer with 10+ years in diverse roles, including fullstack development, AI-agent infrastructure, and system architecture. His proficiency in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud platforms aligns well with the primary stack. Additionally, his contributions to open-source projects, mentorship, and experience with testing frameworks highlight strong engineering and collaboration skills. The only minor concern is the lack of explicit mention of Nest.js, a primary requirement.
strengths: Deep expertise in fullstack development with TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Proven track record in AI-agent infrastructure and system architecture
Strong open-source contributions and mentorship in software craftsmanship
concerns: Limited explicit mention of Nest.js, a primary stack requirement
Primary experience in non-primary secondary technologies (Dlang)
No direct mention of Vitest, though Jest experience is implied
